summary: Small documentation-only PR updating the Discord invite target in .github/README.md. The Discord badge definition was unchanged, but the markdown link reference for [discord] was corrected from the old invite https://discord.gg/CWKqYMePX8 to https://discord.gg/hKx3FJJgrV.
what_changed: Changed the README Discord link reference from https://discord.gg/CWKqYMePX8 to https://discord.gg/hKx3FJJgrV.
Left the shields.io Discord badge URL and other README progress badge links unchanged.
No source, headers, build configuration, or decompilation matching files were modified.
smart_moves: Kept the fix narrowly scoped to the broken or outdated invite URL instead of touching unrelated README content.
Preserved the existing markdown reference-link structure, only replacing the target value for [discord].
decomp_lessons: Not applicable to code matching or decompilation work; this PR is a repository documentation maintenance fix.
For project-facing documentation, external service links such as Discord invites should be treated as maintenance-sensitive metadata and updated with minimal diffs.
naming_conventions: The README uses lowercase markdown reference labels for links such as [discord] and [progress], while badge labels use descriptive names such as [Discord Badge], [Data Progress], and [Linked Progress].
